user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of exit letter templates with their type and description, so that I can see which letters are available.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing letter type and description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a specific letter template, so that I can review its content before it is used.
acceptance_criteria: Given a letter template exists in the list; When I click View for that template; Then I can see the template details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the letter templates list, so that I always see the current set of templates.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the latest data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step after reviewing letter templates, so that I can continue the configuration workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have reviewed the letter templates; When I click Next; Then I advance to the next step
